prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for pyridine (11 atoms: N + 5 C + 5 H) computed at DFT tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, PySCF RKS, exact four-center integrals — no density fitting), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The N±1 states used cation (charge +1, doublet) and anion (charge −1, doublet). Partial charges via Mulliken (PySCF). Three single-point SCFs were run on the neutral, cation, and anion to obtain condensed Fukui indices by finite difference.

Headline result — most electrophilic site: Atom 1 (N), f⁺ = 0.48422572.
Most nucleophilic heavy-atom site: Atom 4 (C), f⁻ = 0.11826260.

Full per-atom table:
  Atom 1  N :  f⁺= 0.48422572, f⁻= 0.06412267, f⁰= 0.27417420, dual= +0.42010305
  Atom 2  C :  f⁺= 0.32447226, f⁻= 0.00618771, f⁰= 0.16532998, dual= +0.31828454
  Atom 3  C :  f⁺= 0.14032094, f⁻= 0.11823139, f⁰= 0.12927616, dual= +0.02208955
  Atom 4  C :  f⁺= 0.14039588, f⁻= 0.11826260, f⁰= 0.12932924, dual= +0.02213328
  Atom 5  C :  f⁺= 0.29962625, f⁻= 0.11206595, f⁰= 0.20584610, dual= +0.18756030
  Atom 6  C :  f⁺= 0.29947706, f⁻= 0.11200985, f⁰= 0.20574345, dual= +0.18746722
  Atom 7  H :  f⁺=-0.14151320, f⁻= 0.08284851, f⁰=-0.02933234, dual= -0.22436171
  Atom 8  H :  f⁺=-0.13368410, f⁻= 0.09817949, f⁰=-0.01775231, dual= -0.23186359
  Atom 9  H :  f⁺=-0.13365905, f⁻= 0.09818226, f⁰=-0.01773840, dual= -0.23184131
  Atom 10 H :  f⁺=-0.13981630, f⁻= 0.09496009, f⁰=-0.02242810, dual= -0.23477639
  Atom 11 H :  f⁺=-0.13984545, f⁻= 0.09494948, f⁰=-0.02244799, dual= -0.23479493

Integrity checks: status=ok, trustworthy=true; sum(f⁺)=1.0000, sum(f⁻)=1.0000. No engine warnings reported.

Output JSON: pyridine_fukui_dft.json. Plot: .../agent_call_01_plot.png.
CLI: python cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --out pyridine_fukui_dft.json
